page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs focuses the hardware profile on memory-intensive compute tasks. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable performance without resource contention, offering qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high memory capacity relative to CPU resources.

Given the memory-to-CPU ratio of 1:8 and the dedicated 48-core Intel Xeon processor, this instance is suited for memory-optimized workloads. Appropriate use cases include in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.12xlarge is an x86_64 server instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, it provides 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications where dedicated CPU execution and high memory density are critical. It is suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and enterprise data processing.
